examples: Without sufficient pollination, the growth of the corn is stunted.
Nevertheless, anecdotal reports of wind pollination in cycads cannot be ignored.
Furthermore, the structure of most female cycad cones seems inconsistent with direct pollination by wind.
The letter also says cross-pollination by bees is very rare when separation distances are 200m.
It depends on three birds for pollination - the bellbird, stitchbird and the tui.
